title: hakea rosmarinifolia

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its use in treating various health conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and inflammation. The plant's bark is also used medicinally, containing phenolic compounds like ferulic acid and sinapic acid, while its roots contain sesquiterpenes like hakeenol and hakerenol. side_effects: Hakea rosmarinifolia can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, diarrhea, and stomach cramps due to its emetic and purgative properties. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to kidney damage and electrolyte imbalance. In some cases, ingesting large amounts of hakea rosmarinifolia can cause seizures, tremors, and other central nervous system problems.
